name: hermes-browser-extension
description: Browser-native side panel for Hermes Agent — connect web context to your local Hermes runtime.
author: Jon Komet

scripts.check:js: node --check extension/sidepanel.js && node --check extension/background.js && node --check extension/content.js && node --check extension/lib/common.mjs
scripts.verify: npm run test && npm run check:js && npm run check:manifest
